name: Water Wyrm
tips: Burning slides right off: the Rally Cleanse clears Burning and any stat debuffs every one of your turns.
Targeted removal magic (Dark Matter Barrage's single-target mode, White Lasercannon-style picks) simply cannot choose it — only board-wide magic, minions, and reacts touch it.
Tree Wyrm's tutor fetches Water Wyrms — a debuff-proof 33🗡️/33🤍 is the safest body to restock with.
Cleanse is not a heal: chip damage stays. Pair it with healing if you want the wall to last forever.
rulings: Cannot be targeted by magic cards: it is never a legal SINGLE_TARGET for a magic card. Area magic (e.g. Acidic Rain) still affects it — untargetable, not immune.
Rally: Cleanse removes Burning and resets negative 🗡️/🤍 marks to 0. Positive buffs are untouched, and lost health is NOT restored.
Cleanse fires in the owner's Rally Phase (start of turn), after the turn-start sequence — a burn tick that already resolved in the opponent's Decay Phase is not undone.
Summon: Draw 1 fires after the summon resolves (Window B); a full hand overdraw-burns the drawn card.
